args.text: CVE-2026-30117: High-severity session-fixation vulnerability in token refresh path. Affects auth-api and session-store. Requires immediate patching and post-patch session re-establishment for all staff.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117 remediation.

Services to be patched:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed in sequence, with auth-api deployed first, followed by session-store. All staff sessions will require re-establishment post-patch.

args.text: CVE-2026-30117 patching complete. Both services confirmed at patched versions: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching has been completed and verified.

Deployment status:
- auth-api: v5.8.4 ✓
- session-store: v2.2.9 ✓

Both services are running patched versions. Credential rotation and staff session re-establishment to follow.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per checklist: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys rejection confirmed.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Following security maintenance completed tonight, all staff sessions have been invalidated as part of CVE-2026-30117 remediation.

Please sign in again when you next access Arclight services. This ensures your session uses updated security credentials and protects against the session-fixation vulnerability that was patched.

Thank you for your attention to this security matter.
